permissions.fallback_msg: The python-code skill needs to read files in your workspace (source code, configuration, schema files, etc.). Allow this read access?
The python-code skill wants to create or modify files in your workspace (source code, pyproject.toml, requirements.txt, schema.sql, CHANGELOG, etc.). Allow this write?
The python-code skill needs to read version-controlled source files to assist with refactoring, structure, or documentation. Allow this?
The python-code skill wants to create or modify source code files (modules, tests, entry points, docstrings, etc.). Allow this?
The python-code skill wants to run a shell command (e.g., create a virtualenv, install dependencies, or run tests). Review the command and allow?
The python-code skill wants to install packages (e.g., via pip, poetry, or uv). Allow package installation?
The python-code skill needs to read environment variables (e.g., to check for secrets, API keys, or configuration values). Allow this?
The python-code skill wants to create a version-control commit (e.g., after a bug fix with a drafted commit message). Allow this?
